entity: 1979 NBA Draft #1 overall pick: Magic Johnson (LAL; the 1979 draft also included Larry Bird at #6)
notes: Magic Johnson was the #1 pick out of Michigan State; went on to win 5 championships, 3 Finals MVPs, and 3 regular-season MVPs. The 1979 draft is famous for the Magic-Bird rivalry that began here (Bird was #6 to BOS).
